✔ tools/list and tools/call return provider-owned tool results (0.1505ms)

✔ prompts/list and prompts/get delegate argument validation to the provider (0.149834ms)

✔ provider errors map through reusable JSON-RPC error helpers (0.051208ms)
✔ capabilities are derived from provider shape with no optional providers (0.02875ms)

✔ Fetch handler rejects unsupported protocol headers before provider dispatch (0.2755ms)
✔ Fetch handler maps JSON parse failures to JSON-RPC parse errors (0.293167ms)
